Featured core

DIH Core Bundle

Five practical entry-point processors for real sessions: space, architecture, dynamics control, drum glue, and low-end foundation.

FX / Spatial

SacredVerb

Expressive harmonic space with emotional decay behavior, smooth musical tail evolution, and clean mix integration.

  • Emotion-driven reverb engine
  • Harmonic decay shaping
  • Designed for vocals, keys, pads, and melodic sources
Core bundle Download demo
FX / Spatial

Cathedral

Architectural space modeling reverb for dimensional environments, clear reflection structure, and controlled diffusion.

  • Architectural reverb modeling
  • Defined early reflections and spatial depth
  • Stable low-end response without wash buildup
Core bundle Download demo
Dynamics / Guard

DEBO

Dynamic ceiling control and mix protection for clean output behavior without destroying musical movement.

  • Transparent limiting behavior
  • Controlled gain structure management
  • Clean transient preservation
Core bundle Demo slot ready
Dynamics / Guard

DrumKrushGlue

Parallel drum energy engine that blends compression, saturation, and glue into one controlled density system.

  • Parallel compression architecture
  • Saturation-driven drum density
  • Punch and glue while preserving transients
Core bundle Download demo
Bass / Low End

Mariana

Deep low-end foundation and sub-pressure control for bass sources, 808s, kick weight, and full mix translation.

  • Core low-end authority processor
  • Foundation control for bass and sub material
  • Designed to pair with drum glue and spatial depth
Core bundle Download demo

Bundle strategy

DIH Core Bundle

The Core Bundle is the practical first purchase. Companion bundles let customers expand by workflow instead of buying a confusing pile of individual processors.

Core Bundle

Space, Glue, Foundation

SacredVerb, Cathedral, DEBO, DrumKrushGlue, and Mariana. The entry bundle for space, drum force, clean control, and low-end authority.

Vocal Capture Bundle

Mic Source Chain

GOLD, SILVER, WPR, AEGIS_NOVA, TRIPLER, and EchoLocate. Built for lead vocals, stacks, mic color, and source placement.

Bass Foundation Bundle

Low-End System

Mariana, Monolith, Depth Boost Pro, and NTRPL. For bass guitar, 808s, synth bass, kick foundation, and low-end translation.

Master Bus Bundle

Final Authority

SPHYNX, MAAT, PLATINUM, HORIZON_X, IMHOTEP, ANKH, and SESHAT. A full print path for balance, lift, structure, containment, and analysis.

Color Amp Tape Bundle

Analog Character

APIS, PTAHTUBE, KHEPRI, and SOVEREIGN. Harmonic body, tube color, tape emergence, and authority-driven analog tone.

Spatial Motion Bundle

Depth, Width, FX

DEPTH_IMPACT_HYBRID_X, PARALLAX, NSR, NTRSTLLR, Cathedral, and SacredVerb. The bus-focused expansion for depth, motion, and living space.

Beat Builder Bundle

Drums + Dynamics

DIH_DRUM_MORPHER, BALLPARK, DRUMKRUSHGLUE, ANUBIS, OTIS, DEBO, and LOOKOUT. For beat creation, punch, guard, and rhythmic density.

Creative Lab Bundle

Transform + Harmonics

THOTH, TEHUTI, AU, SLOTMACHINE, ARCHAEOLOGIST_X, and SERQET. For harmonic writing, recovery, width contour, and intentional transformation.

Current canon

13 Primary Families, 42 Plugins

The store category map follows the current ANKH family manifest. Older 10-family reference language stays available as education, not catalog authority.

Vocal / Mic Source Color / Amp / Tape Mastering Core Master Field Field Tone Balance Dimensional Impact Move Dynamics Guard Bass / Low End FX / Spatial Harmonics / Pitch Drum Instrument Creative Transform Utility Observation

Demo center

Try Before You Buy

Every Core Bundle plugin gets a demo slot for full-quality workflow testing, walkthrough videos, manuals, and release notes. Companion bundles can follow the same account/download structure.

  • BassMARIANA -> NTRPL -> MONOLITH foundation chain
  • FXNTRSTLLR -> Cathedral -> SacredVerb spatial chain
  • WidthDEPTH_IMPACT_HYBRID_X -> PARALLAX -> NSR depth and motion chain
  • MasterSPHYNX -> Maat -> ANKH -> SESHAT

Support

DIHWorld Audio Philosophy

Audio processing should behave like a system, not a collection of effects. Every plugin occupies a role inside structured signal flow: space, dynamics, control, harmonic shaping, and low-end architecture.

Customer portal

Downloads, Licenses, Activations, Manuals, Updates

WooCommerce accounts can become the customer hub once pricing, payment gateways, download protection, and licensing are connected.
